kmp_platform_boundary.description: Platform API leakage across KMP source set boundaries
look_for: java.*, android.*, dalvik.* imports in commonMain source sets
Platform annotations (@HiltViewModel, @Inject) in shared code
JVM-only APIs (Thread, String.format, System.currentTimeMillis, java.io.File) in common code
Missing expect/actual boundaries for platform-specific functionality
Direct platform SDK calls that should go through expect/actual declarations
skip: Platform source sets (androidMain, iosMain) where platform APIs are expected
Test source sets that target a specific platform

look_for: mutableStateOf() outside remember{} blocks
ViewModel passed as @Composable function parameter instead of hoisted
Side effects outside LaunchedEffect/SideEffect/DisposableEffect
@Composable functions with excessive parameters (>8)
LazyColumn/LazyRow items() calls without key parameter
skip: Test composables in test source sets
Top-level navigation composables where parameter count is inherently high

dependency_health.description: Review Gradle dependency management. Check version catalog (libs.versions.toml) for Kotlin/Compose version compatibility. Look for dependencies in platform source sets that should be in commonMain. Verify build.gradle.kts has all required KMP targets (especially iosSimulatorArm64 for simulator testing).
look_for: Kotlin/Compose version incompatibilities in version catalog
Dependencies in platform source sets that should be in commonMain
Missing KMP targets (especially iosSimulatorArm64 for simulator testing)
Hardcoded dependency versions instead of version catalog references
Unused or redundant dependencies across source sets
Deprecated com.android.library plugin in KMP modules (migrate to com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library)
allprojects/subprojects blocks that prevent Gradle configuration-on-demand
Redundant java plugin alongside kotlin(jvm/multiplatform)
Deprecated withJava() in KMP JVM targets (Gradle 8.7+)
kapt usage that should be migrated to KSP
Duplicate library entries in version catalog
AGP version below 9.0 needing KMP migration planning
buildSrc directory instead of included build (build-logic)
skip: Test-only dependencies in test source sets
Platform-specific dependencies that are inherently non-shared

cross_module_architecture.description: Evaluate source set DAG adherence. commonMain should contain shared abstractions. Platform source sets (androidMain, iosMain) should only contain platform-specific implementations. Check expect/actual completeness across configured targets. Verify no circular dependencies between modules.
look_for: Shared abstractions leaking into platform source sets
Platform implementations in commonMain
Incomplete expect/actual declarations across configured targets
Circular dependencies between modules
God modules mixing persistence, orchestration, and UI concerns
skip: Single-module projects where source set separation is the boundary

abstraction_fitness.description: Review expect/actual design. Check for expect class with body that could be simplified to expect fun + interface. Verify that platform implementations are minimal and delegate to shared logic where possible. Look for over-abstraction in commonMain.
look_for: expect class with body that could be simplified to expect fun + interface
Platform implementations that duplicate shared logic
Over-abstraction in commonMain with pass-through wrappers
Missing abstractions where platform code is duplicated
Leaky abstractions where callers bypass expect/actual boundaries
skip: Simple expect/actual pairs for platform primitives
Adapters that intentionally isolate external API volatility

system_prompt_append: When reviewing Kotlin Multiplatform code, pay special attention to source set boundaries (commonMain vs platform source sets), expect/actual declaration completeness, and Compose Multiplatform state management patterns.
